summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema Financeiro Industrial batch planejamento endpoint and frontend integration. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@sfi.com / admin123 - successful
POST /api/planejamento/batch endpoint - saves multiple items successfully (9 inserts)
POST /api/planejamento single endpoint - still works after batch implementation
GET /api/plano-contas/hierarquico - returns hierarchical chart of accounts
DRE annual and monthly endpoints - working correctly
Frontend login flow - successful authentication and token storage
Frontend Planejamento page - loads with proper table structure and save button
Frontend DRE page - loads with financial data and calculations
Navigation between Planejamento and DRE pages - working correctly
Backend-frontend integration - all API calls successful
